title: Orlando Gonzalez
compiled_truth: Orlando Gonzalez is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-08-03 to 2001-11-27), Orlando Gonzalez sent 16 and received 116 emails, totalling 132 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (10), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (8), [Joe Kishkill](people/joe-kishkill) (6), [Rebecca Mcdonald](people/rebecca-mcdonald) (5), [Sergio Assad](people/sergio-assad) (4).
